diagrams.title: Data Center Energy Distribution Pie Chart
diagrams.description: Shows how energy is distributed in a typical data center
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where energy goes and why cooling is a major challenge

diagrams.title: PUE Comparison Bar Chart
diagrams.description: Compare PUE values across different data center types
diagrams.purpose: Understand efficiency variations and improvement potential

diagrams.title: Server Utilization vs Energy Waste
diagrams.description: Shows energy consumption at different utilization levels
elements: 25% Utilization - High waste (60% of peak power)
10% Utilization - Severe waste (70% of peak power)
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate why low utilization is a major problem

diagrams.title: Green Cloud Challenges Mind Map
diagrams.description: Central topic with branches showing different challenge categories
diagrams.purpose: Overview of all challenge categories in green cloud computing
